target_0.brief_supporting_logic: Visible destruction of facade and roof panels across multiple floors; structural framing appears intact but non-load-bearing elements are extensively damaged, consistent with 45-75% area damage per doctrinal definition.

target_1.brief_supporting_logic: Visible destruction of upper floors with missing walls and exposed structural elements; significant facade collapse and debris consistent with 45-75% structural damage.

summary: Two buildings assessed with SEVERE DAMAGE, both confirmed to have 45-75% area damage with visible facade and structural collapse. The overall scene depicts a multi-story building with extensive upper-floor destruction and exposed structural elements, alongside a smaller adjacent structure with minimal visible damage. The likely functional impact is complete loss of occupancy and operational capability for the severely damaged building.
